title: Fix hardcoded temp-business-id in admin frontend
description:
The admin frontend has a hardcoded 'temp-business-id' that breaks multi-business functionality.

**Acceptance Criteria:**

- [ ] Replace with dynamic business ID from auth context or route params
- [ ] Verify admin works with different business IDs
- [ ] No hardcoded business IDs remain in codebase

**Milestone:** Demo-Ready (blocker)
close_reason: Replaced hardcoded temp-business-id with BusinessContext in all 4 admin files. Business ID now comes from VITE_BUSINESS_ID env var or localStorage.

close_reason: Phase 4 implementation complete - Mobile: 122 tests, API: 907 tests

title: POS Integration & Source of Truth - Epic
description: Transform Drink-UX into the source of truth for coffee shop menu management, syncing TO POS systems (starting with Square). Enables the core product vision: inverted drink ordering where customers build what they want and discover what it's called. See docs/plans/2026-01-10-pos-integration-design.md for full design.
close_reason: All 16 implementation tasks complete + comprehensive documentation added

title: Fix 13 failing API tests (env isolation)

13 API tests are failing due to environment isolation issues.

title: Error Handling and Edge Cases
description: Comprehensive error handling: sync failures (retry, clear messages, auth expiry prompts), order failures (payment declined, POS unreachable, item unavailable), POS downtime detection (health checks, 'temporarily unavailable' message). Edge cases: cart persistence across refreshes, offline indicator, invalid/old slugs (404), setup_complete state ('Coming soon'), ejected shops ('No longer available'). TDD: test all error scenarios, edge cases, graceful degradation.

title: End-to-end manual testing against Square sandbox
description:
Manually test the complete end-to-end flow against Square sandbox environment.

**Prerequisites:**
- Square sandbox app created at developer.squareup.com
- Environment variables configured (SQUARE_APPLICATION_ID, etc.)
- PostgreSQL running with migrations applied
- API server running

**Test Flow:**
1. [ ] Create new business via onboarding wizard
2. [ ] Complete Square OAuth (sandbox)
3. [ ] Import catalog from Square
4. [ ] AI transforms catalog successfully
5. [ ] Review and save transformed catalog
6. [ ] View catalog in admin dashboard
7. [ ] Edit a catalog item and save
8. [ ] Open mobile app for the business
9. [ ] Build a drink with customizations
10. [ ] Submit order
11. [ ] Verify order appears in Square sandbox dashboard

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] All 11 steps complete without errors
- [ ] Any bugs found are logged as separate issues
- [ ] Demo flow is documented/repeatable

**Milestone:** Demo-Ready (blocker)
